description_long: This is a pair of modern scissors featuring two sharp, elongated black metal blades joined by a central pivot mechanism. The handles are ergonomically shaped, with one loop larger than the other, and are coated in a dark material adorned with a colorful, speckled pattern. A cylindrical attachment is mounted above the pivot, possibly serving as a specialized grip or tool accessory. The blades are pointed, designed for precision cutting, and the overall construction suggests durability and comfort for extended use. The surface of the handles appears slightly textured for improved grip, while the blades have a matte finish. No visible brand markings or logos are present on the exterior.
description: A pair of ergonomic, black scissors with pointed blades and colorful, speckled handles, featuring a cylindrical attachment above the pivot. The handles are asymmetrical and textured for grip.
description_view_0: The scissors are viewed edge-on, showing the thin profile of the blades and the cylindrical attachment above the pivot.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full length of the pointed blades, the asymmetrical, speckled handles, and the cylindrical attachment above the pivot.
description_view_2: The opposite edge-on view highlights the narrowness of the scissors and the alignment of the handles and blades.
description_view_3: This side view mirrors view 1, showing the ergonomic handle design, pointed blades, and the cylindrical attachment in detail.
attribute_handle_type: Asymmetrical ergonomic handles, one larger than the other, coated with textured plastic or rubber for improved grip; suitable for right-handed use.
attribute_blade_joint_type: Visible central screw pivot, likely adjustable for tension.
attribute_finger_loop_design: One large oval loop and one smaller round loop, both with smooth inner surfaces and colorful speckled exterior; designed for comfort and control.
attribute_blade_tip_style: Pointed blade tips for precision cutting.
